name: Carlsbad Beach House
headline: Steps from the Pacific Surf.
description: Coastal living at its finest. Our Carlsbad beach properties offer breezy interiors, ocean views, and the relaxed California atmosphere you've been dreaming of.

features.title: Oceanfront Views
features.body: Wake up to the sound of waves and a view of the Pacific.

features.title: Coastal Chic Decor
features.body: Bright, airy spaces with premium beach-inspired design.

features.title: Village Proximity
features.body: Walk to Carlsbad Village for the best coffee, dining, and shopping.

amenities.title: Direct Booking
amenities.body: Save up to 20% by booking directly on this site — no OTA commissions.

amenities.title: Private Hot Tub
amenities.body: Available in most cabins for the ultimate relaxation.

amenities.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
amenities.body: Perfect for remote work or streaming your favorite shows.

amenities.title: Fully Equipped Kitchen
amenities.body: Everything you need to cook a five-star meal in the mountains.

amenities.title: WhatsApp Support
amenities.body: Instant communication with your host for a seamless stay.

amenities.title: Pet Friendly
amenities.body: Bring your best friend along for the journey.

amenities.title: Fire Pit
amenities.body: Cozy nights under the stars with a warm fire.

amenities.title: Easy Check-in
amenities.body: Keyless entry and professional management for peace of mind.
